title: References
description: Contract lookup surfaces for you-agent-factory: HTTP API, events, schemas, CLI, MCP, and JavaScript runtime.
openingSummary: This family collects the published contract surfaces for you-agent-factory. Use it when you need to look up API operations, event shapes, configuration schemas, CLI commands, MCP tools, or JavaScript runtime bindings—without treating this landing as a how-to guide.

introduction.title: What this family covers
introduction.body: References are isolation-first lookup pages for factory contracts. Each linked surface owns one contract family: the HTTP API, durable event corpora, factory and config schemas, the CLI command matrix, MCP tool contracts, or the JavaScript runtime surface. Start here to choose the right contract page; open a child page only when you need that surface’s fields, operations, or examples.

discoverability.title: Contract surfaces
discoverability.body: Each card opens one contract family. Labels stay readable on narrow viewports; paths remain stable while sibling pages land.

api.title: HTTP API
api.body: OpenAPI operations and request/response contracts for the factory HTTP surface.

events.title: Events
events.body: Durable event corpora and envelope shapes for factory response streams.

factory-schema.title: Factory schema
factory-schema.body: JSON Schema for packaged factory documents and their required fields.

you-config-schema.title: you config schema
you-config-schema.body: Configuration schema for you-agent-factory runtime and workspace settings.

mock-workers-schema.title: Mock workers schema
mock-workers-schema.body: Schema for mock worker definitions used in local and test harnesses.

cli.title: CLI
cli.body: Command matrix and flags for the you CLI.

mcp.title: MCP
mcp.body: Model Context Protocol tool contracts exposed by the factory.

javascript-runtime.title: JavaScript runtime
javascript-runtime.body: JavaScript runtime bindings and package surface for embedding factory work.
